debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
x : Time → Space 1
⊢ S.EquationOfMotion x ∧
      x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ∧
        Time.deriv x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC →
    x = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC

failed_attempts:
rintro ⟨hEq, hx0, hv0⟩
  rw [← sub_eq_zero]
  let y := x - IC.trajectory S
  have hy : S.EquationOfMotion y := by
    rw [EquationOfMotion, gradLagrangian_eq_force, force_eq_linear] at hEq ⊢
    intro t
    simp only [Pi.sub_apply, Time.deriv_sub (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), hEq t,
      trajectory_equationOfMotion S IC t]
    simp [smul_sub]
  let E (t : Time) : ℝ := ‖∂ₜ y t‖^2 + S.ω^2 * ‖y t‖^2
  have hE : ∀ t, E t = 0 := by
    have hE_deriv : ∀ t, ∂ₜ E t = 0 := by
      intro t
      simp only [E]
      rw [Time.deriv_add (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), Time.deriv_mul_const (by fun_prop)]
      rw [Time.deriv_norm_sq (by fun_prop), Time.deriv_norm_sq (by fun_prop)]
      have hyt := hy t
      rw [EquationOfMotion, gradLagrangian_eq_force, force_eq_linear] at hyt
      simp only [neg_smul] at hyt
      have h_acc : ∂ₜ (∂ₜ y) t = - S.ω^2 • y t := by
        rw [ω_sq, div_eq_inv_mul, mul_smul, ← hyt, inv_smul_smul S.m_neq_zero]
      rw [h_acc, inner_smul_right, real_inner_comm (y t)]
      ring
    have hE0 : E 0 = 0 := by
      simp [E, y, hx0, hv0, trajectory_position_at_zero, trajectory_velocity_at_zero]
    intro t
    have : E t = E 0 := is_const_of_deriv_eq_zero hE_deriv t 0 convex_univ
    rw [this, hE0]
  ext t
  have : ‖y t‖^2 = 0 := by
    have : S.ω^2 * ‖y t‖^2 ≤ E t := le_add_of_nonneg_left (norm_sq_nonneg _)
    rw [hE t] at this
    have w2_pos : 0 < S.ω^2 := pow_pos (abs_pos.mpr S.ω_neq_zero) 2
    exact (mul_eq_zero.mp (le_antisymm this (by positivity))).resolve_left w2_pos.ne'
  exact norm_eq_zero.mp (pow_eq_zero this)
